rejection_reasons: Only the exact reviewed domains apply; remaining elbow pain content lacks exact support.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: People with relevant elbow pain history, examination, results and clinician decisions entered.
setting_applicability: DHA is directly Dubai applicable for sprain and strain assessment but partial across traumatic, tendinous, inflammatory and neurological elbow causes.
UAE_applicability: DHA directly supports Dubai virtual sprain and strain assessment; elbow-specific imaging and referral pathways remain required.
recency_verification: The cited current official documents and exact sections were opened and reviewed on 2026-07-16.
superseded_check: The selected official pages remained current; no newer replacement was identified during the targeted review.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports entered pain, swelling, weakness, mechanism and history for elbow pain; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports clinician-assessed red flags, differential and investigations for elbow pain; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports clinician-led management and referral documentation for elbow pain; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.

unresolved_source_gaps: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
